bonus_items.title: Hardcoded default signing key
bonus_items.evidence: SECRET_KEY = "change-me-signing-key" is a static, committed default... anyone can forge valid HMAC tokens

bonus_items.title: Timing-unsafe password comparison
bonus_items.evidence: verify_password uses == on hashes, which short-circuits and is timing-attackable

bonus_items.title: No upload size enforcement
bonus_items.evidence: max_upload_mb config exists but is never applied... accept arbitrary-size content (DoS)

bonus_items.title: Unvalidated/negative transfer amount
bonus_items.evidence: a negative amount reverses the transfer direction (steal funds)

bonus_items.title: Unchecked JSON keys cause 500
bonus_items.evidence: Missing JSON keys... raise KeyError → unhandled 500 rather than a clean 400

fp_items.evidence: parse_task_spec runs ast.literal_eval on external input ... trigger resource exhaustion (DoS)

bonus_items.title: Hardcoded default HMAC secret key
bonus_items.evidence: SECRET_KEY = "change-me-signing-key" is a static, committed HMAC key ... anyone can forge valid tokens

bonus_items.title: Missing auth on /transfer endpoint
bonus_items.evidence: The /transfer endpoint performs no authentication/authorization, so any caller can move money between arbitrary accounts

bonus_items.title: No validation of negative/invalid transfer amount
bonus_items.evidence: A negative amount passes the < amount check and effectively transfers money in reverse

bonus_items.title: Non-constant-time hash comparison
bonus_items.evidence: verify_password compares hashes with ==, which short-circuits and is timing-sensitive

bonus_items.title: Unhandled KeyError/500 on malformed JSON input
bonus_items.evidence: direct body["username"]/body["amount"] indexing raises unhandled KeyError/500s on malformed input

fp_items.evidence: ast.literal_eval on untrusted input ... can still be abused with deeply nested literals to exhaust memory/CPU

bonus_items.title: Hardcoded default signing secret
bonus_items.evidence: SECRET_KEY = "change-me-signing-key" is a static default committed to source; anyone with the code can forge valid tokens

bonus_items.title: Negative amount allows theft in transfer
bonus_items.evidence: Negative amount also passes the < amount check and lets a caller steal by transferring a negative amount

bonus_items.title: Non-constant-time password/hash comparison
bonus_items.evidence: verify_password compares hashes with ==, which is timing-variable

bonus_items.title: Unhandled malformed input (KeyError/uncaught 500)
bonus_items.evidence: request.get_json(force=True) plus direct body[...] indexing raises unhandled KeyError ... ValueErrors propagate as uncaught 500s

bonus_items.title: Non-dict YAML top-level crashes merge
bonus_items.evidence: if the YAML top-level is a non-dict ... update raises
